creator: Nakai@abricot.co.jp
text:
I have ported gnome-0.27 and at least panel, the Gnome core works
with many core dumps. :-) Also, all applet doesn't work.
This port needs devel/ORBit , send-pred as ports/7654.
It can compile with gcc-2.7.2.1.

Gnome on FreeBSD depends on your network environment.
- comment out ifconfig_** line in /etc/rc.conf but leave interface entry.
- change /etc/hosts when you have error about 'FQDN' with panel.

And also, this port may not work on FreeBSD-current,
and this port is for developpers only.

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
